name: Alex Rivera
notes: Elite interior defender. High motor. Struggles with perimeter shooting.

name: Jordan Smith
notes: Elite floor general. Vision is top-tier. Vulnerable to full-court press.

name: Casey Chen
notes: Traditional rim protector. Excellent timing on blocks. Limited offensive range.

name: Taylor Mack
notes: Pure scorer. Can create own shot. Defensive effort is inconsistent.

name: Riley Quinn
notes: Lockdown perimeter defender. High IQ. Passive on the offensive end.

name: Morgan Blair
notes: High energy rebounder. Effective in pick-and-roll. Poor free-throw shooter.

name: Sam Davies
notes: Versatile stretch-four. Good three-point shooter. Weak post positioning.

name: Chris Lee
notes: Explosive first step. Finishes well at the rim. Tends to over-dribble.

name: Jamie Varga
notes: Physical presence. Dominates the offensive glass. Slow lateral movement.

name: Drew Hicks
notes: Reliable backup. Good ball handling. Lacks elite speed.

name: Skyler Moon
notes: High vertical. Lob threat. Defensive rotations are often late.

name: Peyton Reed
notes: Excellent court awareness. Strong mid-range game. Undersized for position.

name: Blake Foster
notes: Great size. Soft touch around the rim. Struggles against mobile bigs.

name: Sasha Lane
notes: Do-it-all player. Good outlet passer. No standout elite skill.

name: Quinn Taylor
notes: Dangerous catch-and-shoot threat. Spaces the floor well. Weak on-ball defense.

name: Avery Moss
notes: Gritty player. Wins 50/50 balls. Limited offensive skill set.

name: Dakota West
notes: Clutch performer. Wants the ball late. Prone to turnovers under pressure.

name: Hayden Cruz
notes: Defensive specialist. Vocal leader on floor. Minimal scoring threat.

name: Parker Bell
notes: Fluid athlete. Good in transition. Struggles in half-court sets.

name: Emerson Jett
notes: Fastest player on roster. High steal rate. Gambles too much on defense.

name: Phoenix Ray
notes: Strong post-up game. High field goal percentage. Poor conditioning.

name: Logan Grey
notes: Consistent shooter. Good on-ball defender. Lacks playmaking creativity.

name: Stevie North
notes: Dominant shot blocker. Controls the paint. Zero shooting range.

name: Jesse Webb
notes: Smart cutter. Finds gaps in defense. Weak against physical forwards.

name: Charlie Dunn
notes: Great at drive-and-kick. Unselfish. Reluctant to take open shots.

name: Ellis Knight
notes: Excellent footwork. Difficult to guard in mid-post. Heavy feet on defense.

name: River Song
notes: Elite shot creator. Deep range. Can be a ball stopper.

name: Jules Thorne
notes: Solid screens. Boxes out every play. Lacks verticality.

name: Skye Fall
notes: Good help-side defender. Reliable mid-range. Average handle.

name: Arlo Vance
notes: Nuisance on defense. High pressure. Weak finishing at the cup.
